title: Playground Portability Hub
concept: A single-column progressive disclosure redesign that treats every Playground action as a portability step: start or import, save to browser or local directory, export to GitHub or zip, and package Blueprints for reuse.
focus: Distinct launch routes with route-specific inputs
Browser save versus local directory save
Blueprint catalog inspection and bundle actions
Temporary state and destructive action visibility
flows: Select Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, or zip import
Save a temporary Playground to browser storage or a local directory with file-copy progress
Manage saved Playgrounds with rename and delete states
Inspect a Blueprint, copy its link, download its bundle, or run it over the current site
Use Site Manager settings, files, blueprint, database, logs, and export actions from one progressive page
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
